purpose: Top-level introduction to the React 18 dashboard architecture. Describes the component hierarchy, data flow from IPC/SSE into AppContext, the role of useDashboardData, and how progress files merge with the static plan to render live agent state.
gotchas: Renderer never talks directly to the file system — all data flows via IPC/SSE through hooks
patterns: Single global Context + useReducer state machine
Push-driven UI updates via subscription hooks
conventions: Components, hooks, context, and styles each live in distinct subfolders under src/ui/
